SP1.usage: Primary U35 validation league. Can validate Under 3.5/protected low-total builders when tactical read agrees.

I1.usage: Strong but more conservative than La Liga. Validate only with tactical agreement and no lineup shock.

D1.reason: Model improves globally but high-threshold sample is too small for market validation.
D1.usage: Diagnostic only. Do not validate premium Under 3.5 from this gate.

F1.reason: High-threshold samples unstable and not reliable enough for precision-first gate.
F1.usage: Do not use U35 gate for market validation.

E0.reason: League-specific model underperforms base rate on validation split.
E0.usage: Do not use U35 gate for market validation.

global_fallback.reason: Precision-first mode: league-specific validation required before gate can validate markets.
